opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I am passing pure blood and mucus every 30 minutes, the cramping is unbearable, and I am far too weak to stand up.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: My bowel condition has flared up really badly over the last week — I'm going more than 15 times a day, it's all blood and slime now, and today I can't even get out of bed.

symptom_narrative.onset: the flare built up over the past week and is much worse today
symptom_narrative.character: watery motions full of fresh red blood and mucus, with severe gripping cramps low in the belly just before I go
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst flare I have ever had — the cramping is unbearable and I feel utterly wiped out
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: low down across my belly and around the back passage
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: going more than 15 times a day, roughly every half hour, day and night
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing helps; going to the toilet does not relieve the urge
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: it just keeps going regardless of what I do
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: feeling feverish and sweaty, exhausted, and a constant painful urge to go even when there is nothing left to pass
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had flares before but never anything like this — usually my tablets settle it
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm bedbound and using a commode next to the bed because I'm too weak and the urge is too sudden to make it to the bathroom

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: ulcerative colitis (a chronic bowel condition) for about 4 years
past_medical_history.how_managed: usually controlled with a tablet I take every day

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: my spouse is here with me and made the call because I'm too weak to manage on my own

objective_data_offered.value: feels feverish and sweaty; home thermometer reads a bit over 38 degrees
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home thermometer, not clinically calibrated

objective_data_offered.value: feels very dizzy and her heart pounds whenever she tries to sit up, and she cannot stand without feeling she will faint
spouse says she looks very pale and washed out, is sweaty and clammy, and is completely drained
spouse reports the commode beside the bed is full of fresh red blood and slimy mucus
home scales show she has lost about 4 kg over the past week
